summary: The diff shows modifications to ServiceDetailPanel.tsx to implement REQ-1 (EagleClickAnimation trigger on 'Get Started' click, blocking navigation, then scrolling to #contact). However, REQ-2 (applying the same behavior to 'Get Started' buttons directly in ServicesSection service cards) is not evidenced in the diff — ServicesSection.tsx is mentioned in the file summaries but only described as having 'clickable glassmorphism cards with hover effects... and integration with service detail panel,' with no mention of a 'Get Started' button click handler using EagleClickAnimation or useCTAClick.

missing_requirements.requirement: In ServicesSection, apply EagleClickAnimation-then-scroll behavior to any 'Get Started' buttons rendered directly within service cards (outside of ServiceDetailPanel).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not show any changes to ServicesSection.tsx that add EagleClickAnimation, useCTAClick, or animation-gated scroll behavior to service card buttons. The file summary for ServicesSection.tsx only mentions hover effects and panel integration, with no indication of the required click handler change.

hallucinated_features.description: ServiceDetailPanel closes (calls onClose) after the animation completes, in addition to scrolling to #contact.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies that after the animation completes the page should scroll to #contact. The diff adds an onClose() call in handleAnimationComplete, which was not requested and could alter the panel's behavior unexpectedly.
